details.productUrlName: Olorins Searing Light Borderless Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Each opponent exiles a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls.
Spell mastery — If there are two or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, Olórin's Searing Light deals damage to each opponent equal to the power of the creature they exiled.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
